title: ClickBank in 2026: Honest Review for Affiliate Marketers
excerpt: ClickBank pays up to 75% commission, but refund rates hit 15–30% in some niches. Here's what actually works on the platform today.
imageAlt: ClickBank marketplace showing digital product listings and commissions
seoTitle: ClickBank Review 2026: Is It Still Worth It?
seoDescription: ClickBank review for 2026 — commission rates, refund risks, top products, and whether it's worth promoting in today's affiliate market.
body:
ClickBank has been paying affiliates since 1998. That longevity means something: the platform works, payments arrive, and the marketplace is enormous. But ClickBank's reputation is polarizing — some affiliates build six-figure businesses on it while others burn their audience's trust promoting low-quality offers. Here's an honest breakdown of where it stands in 2026.

## What ClickBank Actually Is

ClickBank is a marketplace of digital and physical products where vendors set their own commission rates. Affiliates browse the marketplace, generate a unique HopLink, and promote products through content, email, or paid ads. There are no gatekeepers — signing up is free and instant.

The marketplace is enormous. Categories span health and wellness, personal development, software, financial education, home and garden, and more. Commission rates run from 20% to 75%, with the average successful affiliate targeting the 50–70% range.

## The Commission and Refund Reality

The headline commission rates look extraordinary — 75% on a $97 ebook is $72.75 per sale. The reality is that refund rates in ClickBank's top niches run 15–30%. Health and fitness products, in particular, carry high refund risk because buyers often have unrealistic expectations set by aggressive sales copy.

Select products with a Gravity score between 20 and 100. Gravity measures how many affiliates have made at least one sale in the last 12 weeks. Very high Gravity (150+) signals intense competition that will erode your margins on paid traffic. Very low Gravity (under 10) often means the product doesn't convert.

> Evaluate every product's sales page yourself. If it makes claims you wouldn't repeat to your audience, don't promote it.

## Top Performing Categories in 2026

Health and wellness remains the highest-volume category, with products like ProDentim (dental probiotic) posting average payout values above $150 per sale due to upsell chains. Software and services has grown significantly — VIN Checkup, for example, runs a nearly 5% conversion rate on cold traffic, which is exceptional.

Weight loss, anti-aging, and cognitive health continue to dominate the top 20 ClickBank offers each month. These convert well with search and social traffic but require careful attention to FTC compliance and platform advertising policies.

## Payment Structure

ClickBank pays on a bi-weekly schedule by default (two weeks after the end of each pay period, on Wednesdays). You can unlock weekly or twice-weekly payouts after establishing a track record. Payment methods include check, ACH, wire transfer, and Payoneer.

The refund window is typically 30–60 days depending on the vendor, during which ClickBank holds a portion of your commissions in a reserve. Factor this into your cash flow planning.

## Who ClickBank Works Best For

ClickBank is most effective for affiliates who own email lists or run paid traffic to landing pages rather than SEO-driven content sites. The products that perform best need persuasive, benefit-led copy — they don't rank organically for "best [product category]" queries the way Amazon products do.

If you have an established list in personal development, health, or financial education, ClickBank's high commission rates on digital products make it genuinely valuable. If you're building an SEO content site, you'll generally find better alignment with Amazon Associates, ShareASale, or direct brand programs.

## The Bottom Line

ClickBank is legitimate, established, and profitable for the right affiliate. Vet every product before you promote it: read the sales page, check refund rates, look at the vendor's reputation. The platform's laissez-faire marketplace means you have to be the quality filter — your audience is counting on you to be.
